name: Own damage claim process after accident
description: User had a car accident and needs guidance on own damage claim

input.message: I had a minor accident and my car's bumper and headlight are damaged. I have comprehensive insurance with HDFC ERGO. How do I file an own damage claim? Will it affect my NCB?

notes: Must explain: 1) Intimate insurer within 24-48 hrs, 2) FIR if needed, 3) Surveyor visit, 4) Workshop estimate, 5) Claim settlement. Must warn NCB will reset to 0% after claim.
